production_changes: src/alscan/merge/analysis.py:373 — excluded -1 from group identity evidence
src/alscan/merge/analysis.py:557-568 — replaced ordering conflict check with three-way pattern
tests/test_merge_phase2.py:204-206 — updated test with true divergent reorder

defect_fixes.change: Excluded -1 from group identity evidence condition
defect_fixes.rationale: group_id=-1 means 'no group' in Ableton. The default was treated as strong identity evidence.

behavioral_improvements.change: Replaced flat OR of three ordering conditions with proper three-way pattern: conflict only when both branches changed AND to different orders
behavioral_improvements.rationale: Single-branch and convergent reorders should not conflict. The three-way value pattern distinguishes unchanged/one-sided/convergent/conflicting.

behavioral_improvements.change: Updated name-swap test to verify TrackChange objects (renames tracked per-track with auto_resolved=True) rather than expecting conflicts
behavioral_improvements.rationale: Name swaps are per-track single-branch changes. Each rename is correctly tracked as a modified TrackChange.

observations.title: Track field changes use TrackChange, not AutoResolved
observations.description: Per-track field changes are reported as TrackChange objects rather than AutoResolved objects, unlike scalar fields (tempo, time_signature). This is a model design choice.

observations.title: Unchanged locators appear in the locator_changes list
observations.description: Locators identical across all three sides appear with kind='unchanged', inflating the change list.
